A planet proves favourable to those (persons and objects)
whose lord he is declared to be, if, at rising, he be large, of glossy
rays, and in his natural state, if no portentous thunder, meteors,
dust or planetary conflict afflict him, and if he be posited in his own
house, exaltation or be aspected by benefics.
[Bhattotpala interprets as which means the
